articles.title: “I Don’t Know The Rules! 😂” Merab Tells DJ About His RAF Match
The UFC Just Signed a Future Champion
articles.description: Gable Steveson is officially in the UFC… and this changes everything. One of the most decorated athletes to ever enter the sport, Gable Steveson arrives with expectations that go far beyond a normal debut. Chael Sonnen breaks down why this isn’t a slow build situation — and why the UFC may fast-track Steveson immediately. Because sometimes, you just know what you’re looking at. From Olympic gold to WWE, NFL, and now MMA, Steveson has taken risks that most fighters would never consider — and hasn’t lost along the way. Now, he enters a heavyweight division that’s suddenly shifting, with names like Curtis Blaydes, Josh Hokit, and Tyrell Fortune redefining what wrestling looks like at the top level. But there’s a bigger angle here. As Jon Jones continues to go back and forth on his future, the UFC may not wait around. Because the fastest way to move on from a star… is to replace him. And Gable Steveson might be exactly that. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that matter. #UFC #MMA #GableSteveson #JonJones #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Gable Steveson Joins the UFC 1:00 Why He’ll Be Fast-Tracked 2:30 The Jon Jones Angle 4:00 Wrestling Is Taking Over 6:00 Why Gable Is Different 8:00 The Heavyweight Shift Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Arman Tsarukyan’s Dating Advice
articles.description: Arman Tsarukyan just delivered the most unexpected viral moment of the year… and it has nothing to do with fighting. In a clip that’s taken over social media, Tsarukyan gives dating advice that is as simple as it is insane: Order your coffee black. No sugar. No cream. No matcha. Order food? Just meat. Medium rare. And when it comes? Eat it with your hands. Chael Sonnen breaks down why this moment works — and why it might be the most interesting version of Arman we’ve seen yet. This isn’t about technique or rankings. This is about personality, presence, and understanding how to capture attention in today’s fight game. Because in modern MMA, being dangerous isn’t enough. You have to be interesting. And right now, Arman Tsarukyan might be the most interesting man in the sport. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fighters that matter. #UFC #MMA #ArmanTsarukyan #ChaelSonnen #datingadvice 0:00 Arman’s Viral Moment 1:00 The Dating Advice 2:30 Why This Works 4:00 The Reaction 5:30 The “Most Interesting Man” Angle Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: You Can’t Do Business With Jon Jones.
articles.description: Visit https://bearmattress.com/chael and use CODE: chael to get 40% off your Bear mattress Jon Jones says he’s retired… and then says he might fight again. That’s the problem. In one weekend, the narrative around Jon Jones went in every direction — in, out, done, motivated again — and it’s created a situation where nobody knows what to believe anymore. Chael Sonnen breaks down why that matters. Because in the fight business, uncertainty doesn’t build interest — it kills it. Even a massive fight like Jon Jones vs Tom Aspinall slowly lost momentum, not because fans didn’t want it… but because they didn’t believe it would actually happen. And once the audience stops believing, everything falls apart. Now add in the rise of Gable Steveson and a heavyweight division that’s moving forward without him — and the situation gets even more complicated. This isn’t about talent. It’s about trust. Because when a fighter says everything, stands for nothing, and changes direction daily… you can’t build a business around that. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that matter. #UFC #MMA #JonJones #TomAspinall #GableSteveson #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Jon Jones Is In and Out 1:00 Why Fans Stopped Caring 2:30 The Aspinall Fight Problem 4:00 You Can’t Count On Him 6:00 The Gable Steveson Factor 8:00 His Own Career Is Slipping 10:00 The Real Issue: Trust Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Carlos Ulberg Just Shocked Everyone #ufc
articles.description: Carlos Ulberg just changed the entire conversation at light heavyweight—and it’s time to admit it: he proved a lot of people wrong. In this clip, the narrative flips fast. Ulberg didn’t just show up—he delivered using the one tool everyone knew he had: striking. And somehow, that was enough to take over the moment and establish himself as the guy at 205. After what he did against Jiří Procházka, it’s clear this isn’t hype—it’s reality. Now comes the real question: who’s next? The obvious answer is Magomed Ankalaev, a fighter many believed should’ve been in that position already. But with no explanation for why he wasn’t in the mix, the division feels wide open—and a little confusing. Ulberg now holds the spotlight, the momentum, and the narrative. The only thing left is finding the right challenger to solidify his run. This is how quickly things change in MMA—and why you can’t take your eyes off the division. Subscribe for more MMA breakdowns, bold takes, and real fight game insight. #CarlosUlberg #UFC #MMA #JiriProchazka #MagomedAnkalaev #UFCLightHeavyweight #FightTalk

articles.title: Josh Hokit has Arrived!
articles.description: Visit https://bearmattress.com/chael and use CODE: chael to get 40% off your Bear mattress Josh Hokit just changed everything… and most people didn’t see it coming. What started as confusion turned into one of the most compelling breakout moments in recent memory. Over the course of one weekend, Hokit went from a question mark to the most talked-about fighter in the building. Chael Sonnen breaks down what actually happened — and why it worked. From three distinct characters to complete control of the crowd, Hokit did something we’ve never seen before. This wasn’t just about fighting. This was about performance, storytelling, and understanding how to create a moment people care about. And it showed everywhere. Press conference — he stole it. Weigh-ins — he owned it.Fight night — the biggest reaction in the building. But none of it happens without Curtis Blaydes, who pushed the pace and refused to break in a true battle of will. This wasn’t just a win. It was a shift. Because in today’s fight game, being good isn’t enough. You have to matter. And after this weekend, Josh Hokit does. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that matter. #UFC #MMA #JoshHokit #CurtisBlaydes #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Where Do You Start With Hokit? 1:00 The 3 Character Breakdown 3:00 Why This Is Different 5:00 He Took Over the Event 7:00 Credit to Curtis Blaydes 9:00 The Crowd Turns 11:00 Hokit Has Arrived Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: The Real Problem With Prochazka vs Ulberg
articles.description: Visit https://bearmattress.com/chael and use CODE: chael to get 40% off your Bear mattress Jiri Prochazka wants a rematch… but that’s not the real story. The bigger issue is what this fight revealed about the light heavyweight division — and why it didn’t connect the way a title fight should. From a lack of narrative to missed opportunities, Chael Sonnen breaks down why neither Jiri Prochazka nor Carlos Ulberg delivered what the UFC actually needs from a championship matchup. Despite controversy, drama, and even an unusual finish, this wasn’t a fight that built demand for a second chapter. And in today’s fight business, that matters more than ever. Because it’s not just about who wins — it’s about whether anyone cares enough to see it again. Chael also raises a bigger question: where is Magomed Ankalaev — the one man who arguably belongs in the title picture? While the division reshuffles following the exits of Jon Jones, Daniel Cormier, and Alex Pereira, the matchmaking decisions are getting harder to justify. This isn’t just about one fight. It’s about understanding what makes a fight matter — and why that piece is missing right now. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that matter. #UFC #MMA #JiriProchazka #CarlosUlberg #MagomedAnkalaev #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Prochazka Wants a Rematch 0:20 Why That’s Not Happening 0:45 The “Worst Gate” Problem 1:10 Both Fighters Failed the Moment 1:40 Why Controversy Isn’t Enough 2:00 They Didn’t Help the Promotion 2:30 What Difference Does It Make? 2:50 The Division Is Hollowed Out 3:10 Where Is Ankalaev? 3:45 Why He Should’ve Been There 4:10 Why Ulberg Winning Mattered 4:40 The “Gentleman” Problem 5:10 The Story They Didn’t Tell 5:40 Why That Narrative Matters 6:00 Prochazka’s Missed Opportunity 6:30 The Gimmick vs The Message 7:00 The Samurai Character Explained 7:30 What He Still Needs to Do 8:00 Why Fights Must Mean Something 8:30 The Real Fix for Prochazka 9:00 Injury Questions Around Ulberg 9:30 The Same Question Remains Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Carlos Ulberg BLUSHES 😳 EXPOSES City Kickboxing’s Miami Secret
articles.description: Carlos Ulberg EXPOSES Miami Secret 😳 Carlos Ulberg was asked why City Kickboxing always wins in Miami… His answer? “Tootsies.” 😳 After champions like Israel Adesanya and Alexander Volkanovski… Now Ulberg adds his name to the list. articles.title: Carlos Ulberg BLUSHES 😳 as the Secret in Miami is EXPOSED
articles.description: Carlos Ulberg BLUSHES 😳 Reveals City Kickboxing’s Miami Secret What makes City Kickboxing so successful in Miami? A reporter pointed out that Israel Adesanya and Alexander Volkanovski both became champions there… Then Carlos Ulberg overcame injury and did the same. When asked why… Ulberg paused… smiled… and dropped a one-word answer: “Tootsies.” Yeah… that got a reaction 😅 Was he joking… or is there something to it? 👇 Let us know what you think in the comments Website: http://www.MMAWeekly.com/ Subscribe on Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=MMAWeeklyVideos Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MMAWeeklycom-176775391774/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/MMAWeeklycom/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mmaweekly/

articles.title: Daniel Cormier REACTS to Carlos Ulberg KNOCKING OUT Jiri Prochazka, Josh Hokit's INSANE fight
articles.description: Carlos Ulberg KNOCKED OUT Jiri Prochazka in one of the craziest finishes of the year, and Daniel Cormier IS BACK live from the octagon in Miami, Florida after UFC 327! Cormier breaks down Ulberg's massive victory and reacts to him becoming the NEW light heavyweight champion. Plus, DC breaks down two incredible fights: Paolo Costa getting a TKO win vs. Azamat Murzakanov and Josh Hokie beating Curtis Blaydes in an INCREDIBLE fight that went to a decision. And don't miss DC's take on the Josh Hokit vs. Derrick Lewis fight on the White House card, the reveal of what the octagon will look like in Washington D.C., and all the exciting fights that went down at UFC 327 in Miami! articles.title: Chael Explains The Truth About Fight Promotion
articles.description: You think it’s about the fighters. It’s not. Chael breaks down one of the biggest misconceptions in combat sports — that the athlete, the skill, or even the fight itself is what drives success. It isn’t. From professional wrestling psychology to boxing promotions and even the rise of Conor McGregor, Chael explains why production, presentation, and promotion matter more than anything that happens inside the ring or cage. Why do some fights sell and others don’t? Why do certain stars transcend the sport? And why do entire organizations succeed — even when the competition itself isn’t the deciding factor? Because the fight is only part of the product. The real business is the show. This is a breakdown of what actually drives combat sports — and why most people misunderstand it. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that matter. #UFC #MMA #ChaelSonnen #ConorMcGregor #FightBusiness #Boxing 0:00 The Question From Glenn Bell 0:15 The “Storytelling” Myth 0:49 Why Wrestling Psychology Doesn’t Matter 1:22 The Truth About What Sells 2:02 Why Fighters Get It Wrong 3:12 The Only Real Superstar 3:33 The Problem With Boxing Promotion 4:54 Why Talent Doesn’t Matter 5:38 What Promotion Really Is 6:15 Final Truth: It’s the Show Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Josh Hokit is entertaining us all  #ufc
articles.description: In MMA, it’s not just about fighting—it’s about performance. And if you’re going to step into the spotlight, you better be ready to play the part. In this clip, the reality of building a persona in the fight game is broken down. From intense interviews to larger-than-life confidence, fighters often lean into character to stand out. It’s something we’ve seen for decades, going all the way back to the golden era of professional wrestling, where charisma and presence were just as important as skill. But here’s the catch—there’s real risk involved. If you talk big and lose, you don’t just take a loss… you risk looking foolish in front of the entire world. On the flip side, if you win? You can fast-track your way to superstardom almost overnight. That’s the gamble every fighter has to decide on. Stay quiet and safe, or take the risk and try to break through the noise. This is the fight game behind the fight game—the strategy, the persona, and the pressure that comes with it. Subscribe for more MMA insights, fight breakdowns, and real talk on what it takes to stand out. #UFC #MMA #FightTalk #CombatSports #FightMentality #Promotion #MMAAnalysis

articles.title: The Truth About Islam vs Topuria
articles.description: There’s a story brewing between Islam Makhachev and Ilia Topuria—and depending on who you ask, it’s either crystal clear… or completely misunderstood. Chael Sonnen breaks down the timeline that nobody is laying out correctly. Ilia Topuria leaves a title behind to chase Islam at 155. Then Islam moves up to 170, and suddenly the narrative flips. Who chased who? Who avoided what? And why does this storyline seem to hit a nerve every time it’s brought up? This isn’t just about a fight—it’s about legacy, positioning, and who really tried to make it happen. From contract negotiations to weight class jumps, Chael connects the dots and explains why both sides might be telling the same story… but drawing very different conclusions. If this fight never happens, history will still pick a side. And that might be the most important part of all. Watch more breakdowns from Chael Sonnen as he cuts through the noise and tells you what’s really going on in the fight game. #UFC #MMA #ChaelSonnen #IslamMakhachev #IliaTopuria #UFCTalk 0:00 The Story Is Brewing 0:45 Topuria Leaves 145 for Islam 1:21 Oliveira Was Waiting First 1:31 Islam Moves to 170 2:02 The Core Narrative: Who Chased Who 2:50 Islam Responds to the Story 3:36 White House Fight Rumors 4:08 Both Sides Say the Same Thing 4:44 Why This Bothers Islam 5:11 The Money Argument Explained 6:07 Why Topuria’s Case Makes Sense 6:39 Islam’s Promise to Return to 155 7:10 Why That Changed at 170 7:34 Who Really Has the High Ground 8:01 If the Fight Never Happens… 8:42 Does This Fight Even Matter? Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Wrong Guys, Wrong Fight #ufc
articles.description: This light heavyweight title fight? It doesn’t add up—and that’s the problem. In this clip, the frustration is laid out clearly. With Magomed Ankalaev widely viewed as the most deserving contender, it raises a real question—why isn’t he in this fight? Instead, we get a matchup featuring Jiří Procházka and Jan Błachowicz, and the storyline just isn’t landing the way a title fight should. Looking deeper into the division, there are stronger narratives across the board. Khalil Rountree Jr. brings excitement and momentum. Jamahal Hill offers a compelling return angle. And Ankalaev? He’s arguably the most accomplished and deserving of the opportunity. That’s what makes this situation so confusing. A title fight should represent the very best—whether that’s merit, momentum, or marketability. When it misses on all three, fans notice. This isn’t about tearing fighters down—it’s about getting the matchmaking right in one of the UFC’s most important divisions. Subscribe for more MMA breakdowns, real talk, and sharp takes on the fight game. #UFC #MMA #MagomedAnkalaev #JiriProchazka #JanBlachowicz #KhalilRountree #JamahalHill #UFCLightHeavyweight

articles.title: Gable Steveson: Future UFC Champion?
articles.description: Gable Steveson to the UFC feels inevitable—but it hasn’t happened yet. So what’s really going on? Chael Sonnen breaks down the biggest question surrounding one of the most decorated wrestlers in the world: how does Gable actually become a UFC champion? From Olympic gold to WWE to NFL attempts, Gable has done everything—but stepping into the UFC is a completely different game. Chael explores the comparisons to Brock Lesnar, the potential dynamic with Jon Jones, and why timing might be the biggest factor of all. Is there a hidden conflict? Is the UFC waiting? Or is this just a matter of the right moment? More importantly, Chael explains why MMA isn’t like any other sport Gable has touched—because in the UFC, it’s not just about showing up. It’s about who you fight, when you fight them, and how fast you rise. The path is there. The opportunity is real. But until that contract is signed, none of it matters. #UFC #MMA #ChaelSonnen #GableSteveson #Wrestling #UFCDebate 0:00 Gable Steveson: Yes or No? 0:22 The Brock Lesnar Comparison0:56 Why Gable Isn’t Signed Yet 1:36 The Jon Jones Question 2:19 Why Mentorship Matters 3:01 Can Gable and Jon Coexist? 3:44 The Rashad Evans Example 4:01 Why Gable Won’t Be Brought Along Slowly 4:42 Why the UFC Isn’t Rushing5:04 When Fighters Should Call Him Out 6:02 The “Safe Window” to Challenge Gable 6:36 Why MMA Is Different From Everything Else 7:36 Why Opponents Actually Matter in the UFC 8:26 The Fast Track Is There 8:42 The Real First Step: Get Signed Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: The Problem With Topuria vs Makhachev
articles.description: This is one of the biggest fights the UFC can make… and somehow, it still doesn’t feel simple. Ilia Topuria and Islam Makhachev keep circling each other — and the more it comes up, the more complicated it gets. Chael breaks down the strange position the UFC finds itself in. Topuria is rising fast, dominating headlines, and calling his shot. Islam is the champion, but the timing, the weight class, and the circumstances don’t quite line up. And then there’s Justin Gaethje — the man who might be getting overlooked… again. From media strategy to matchmaking politics, this isn’t just about who fights who. It’s about how fighters position themselves, when they take risks, and when they chase the biggest possible moment. Because in today’s UFC, the smartest move isn’t always the next fight… it’s the right fight. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that matter. #UFC #MMA #IliaTopuria #IslamMakhachev #JustinGaethje #ChaelSonnen 0:00 What Do You Do With Topuria?0:17 Big Fight… But Not That Big0:49 The UFC’s Weird Moment1:04 Why Everyone Asks About Islam1:31 The Gaethje Problem2:27 Why Gaethje Gets Overlooked3:05 Topuria vs Islam at 170?3:41 The Real Strategy Behind Callouts4:09 Is Everyone Playing It Wrong?5:12 Fight You Can Get vs Headline Fight6:02 Final Take Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench
